classes.name: Blazewarden
classes.motto: We are the fire that holds back the night.
classes.embershard_form: A blade wreathed in amber flame

classes.name: Lorescribe
classes.embershard_form: A quill that writes in lines of light
classes.story_role: Uncovers hidden knowledge, deciphers ancient texts

classes.name: Shadowstep
classes.motto: The darkness cannot catch what it cannot find.
classes.embershard_form: A cloak that bends light around the wearer

classes.name: Hearthkeeper
classes.motto: A single ember, tended well, can relight the world.
classes.embershard_form: A lantern that never goes out
classes.story_role: Sustainer, keeps the team going through hardship

classes.name: Stormcaller
classes.motto: The wind answers those who aren't afraid to shout.
classes.embershard_form: A drum whose beat shakes the air

classes.name: Ironvow
classes.motto: I said I would. And so I will.
classes.embershard_form: A shield that glows brighter the more it is tested
